effects: Apply review corrections to integration bundle

effects: Refocus review instructions on project surface

effects: Tighten review coverage and prune json_tool surface

timeline.subject: Simplify integration scaffold and json tool surface
effects: Narrowed the repo to the trimmed integration surface.
Reduced the packaged project-owned files to analysis, modules, and tools.

timeline.subject: Simplify manifest review contract
effects: Simplified the review contract around the trimmed integration surface.

timeline.subject: Clarify review handling for missing path items
effects: Made absent or future-reserved path items non-findings by review contract.

timeline.subject: Clarify trimmed archive review boundary
effects: Explicitly scoped the trimmed archive review surface to internal rigor rather than omitted files.

timeline.subject: Tighten meta plan control contracts
effects: Added objective-register provenance, micro-deliverable set contract fields, and stage dependency DAG.
Added MP3 termination predicate and MP4 validation authority.

timeline.subject: Rename meta plan diff to commit hash
effects: Aligned the stored diff artifact name with the originating commit hash.

timeline.subject: Harden patch review artifact contract
effects: Required patch-review artifacts to stay on the shipped project review schema.
Positioned annotated diff patches as supplemental artifacts.

timeline.subject: review templates
effects: Bundled the review schema and template surface into the trimmed repo archive.

timeline.subject: Add context and review manifest surfaces
effects: Add context and review manifest surfaces

current_state.summary: The repo now carries an evolving review pipeline object and a companion git-log object under review/ while concrete review artifacts remain local.
open_items: Append one review_pipeline entry per submitted HEAD review instead of replacing prior entries.
Keep the local review artifact and tracker symlink aligned with the latest appended review entry.
Promote the git-log object as the canonical incremental context surface for future review corrections.
